events.summary: Susquehanna raised price target on Micron Technology (MU) to $525 from $345 citing stronger memory pricing trends.

sources.title: Analyst raises price targets on memory stocks as pricing trends strengthen

events.summary: Keybanc upgraded Federal Signal (FSS), a mid-cap stock, from Sector Weight to Overweight and set price target at $130.
Banc of California filed a new Form S-3 universal shelf registration (File No. 333-293930) effective March 2, 2026.

sources.title: Banc of California files new Form S-3 shelf, files resale prospectus ...

events.summary: Banc of California filed prospectus supplement on March 6, 2026 for resale of voting common stock by certain selling stockholders under November 30, 2023 Registration Rights Agreement.

sources.title: Banc of California files new Form S-3 shelf, files resale prospectus

events.summary: Banc of California filed a new Form S-3 shelf registration and a prospectus supplement on March 6, 2026, to permit resale of voting common stock by certain selling stockholders.
